topic: My wall clock grew a third hand that points at me wherever I stand.
title: My Clock Grew A Hand That Points At Me | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My wall clock grew a third hand, and it points at me wherever I stand.
scenes.image_prompt: An old round wall clock in a dim room, three hands on its face, low light, deep shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is the same clock from my grandmother's kitchen.
scenes.image_prompt: A vintage kitchen wall clock above a stove, faded paint, dim warm light, shadow, muted color, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I wind it every Sunday night.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand winding the back of a wall clock, dim room, lamp glow, long shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning a thin extra hand had appeared.
scenes.image_prompt: A clock face with a slender unusual third hand, harsh side light, shallow focus, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was not pointing at any number.
scenes.image_prompt: Close clock face with a hand pointing off the dial toward the viewer, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was pointing across the room, straight at me.
scenes.image_prompt: A wall clock seen from across a dim room, its extra hand aimed forward, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked the room. The hand followed every step.
scenes.image_prompt: A clock on a wall with its thin hand angled toward a shadowed corner, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I covered it with a cloth and went to bed.
scenes.image_prompt: A wall clock draped under a dark cloth, faint outline beneath, dim room, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The cloth was on the floor by dawn, the hand still aimed.
scenes.image_prompt: A fallen cloth on floorboards below an uncovered clock, dim grey light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the hand began to speed up, hour by hour.
scenes.image_prompt: A blurred fast moving clock hand on a dim face, motion smear, low light, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I took it down and the hand kept turning anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: A clock face up on a table in a dim room, its hand mid spin, lamp glow, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the hand stopped, aimed at my empty chair.
scenes.image_prompt: A clock pointing toward a vacant wooden chair in a dim room, grey light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
